scope: Channel discovery rules — given a niche cluster, decide WHICH channels make it into a generated listicle.

source_corpus.method: reverse-engineered from visual_description + speech_transcription mining of winners' listicle videos

A1_subscriber_band.rationale: Below 10K = no monetization proof; above 5M = breaks replicability framing (corpus: 95% of picks in this band)

A2_top_video_views_floor.rationale: Top video must have crossed 1M views (corpus: 73% of picks have ≥1M, 94% have ≥100K). The proof anchor.

A3_views_to_subs_ratio_floor.rationale: Top video reaches ≥5× subscriber base (corpus median: 33×). Filters out mature channels with no recent virality.

B1_channel_age_max_days.rationale: Median picked channel age is 90 days. 'Brand new AND already viral' is the dominant narrative.

B2_top_video_max_age_months.rationale: Top video posted within last 12 months — channel is currently relevant.

C1_cluster_membership.rationale: Channel has ≥1 video assigned to the requested niche_tree_clusters.id. No separate is_faceless check — cluster membership in a faceless cluster implies it.

D1_minimum_video_count.rationale: Excludes one-and-done channels — must have at least 5 uploads.

D2_not_one_viral_wonder.rationale: Engage.one_viral_only was 0.25× loser-coded in corpus. Median performance must be at least 5% of top video.

proprietary_boosts.rationale: Don't exclude — re-rank candidates that already passed A-D. Phase 2 features.

boosts.description: How often this channel has been referenced in our analyzed listicle corpus
boosts.weight_curve: diminishing returns above 3 mentions; penalty above 4

boosts.description: channel.views_per_day / median(cohort.views_per_day) within the same cluster
Mean cosine distance to K-nearest in combined_v2 embedding space. Already computed as novelty_score in our DB.
Channel created in last 60 days AND already in top-5% of its cluster by views_per_day

assembly_gates.rationale: Applied at LISTICLE assembly time, not per-channel. Operate on the full candidate pool after per-niche discovery.

gates.rule: If channel.consensus_picks_count ≥ 5 in corpus, down-weight by 50% on tie-breaks
gates.rationale: Channels already featured in 5+ other listicles are over-exposed. Diminishing novelty value.

gates.rule: Each niche slot gets at most K=3 channels (default K=2 hero + supporting). No two niches in the same listicle may share cluster_id.
gates.rationale: Forces niche diversity per listicle. Prevents 5 channels from one viral sub-cluster being labeled 'Top 5 niches'.

gates.rule: Within one generated listicle, at least 1 channel ∈ [10K,100K], at least 1 ∈ [100K,1M], at least 1 ∈ [1M,5M]
gates.rationale: Listicles need rhythm — 'this tiny channel... AND this big one...' narrative variation.

steps: 1. SQL query: candidates passing A + B + C + D via JOIN niche_tree_assignments + shorts_channels + shorts_videos
2. Enrich with proprietary signals (novelty, cohort growth, consensus picks)
5. Listicle assembler applies Gates 1-3 across N×K candidate pool from N niches

intentionally_excluded_rules.reason: No reliable classifier in our DB. Brand accounts producing good faceless content still prove the niche works.
Requires per-channel Gemini analysis we may not have run. Scale + cluster filters already exclude most marketing accounts.
Redundant with cluster membership. Brittle binary classification — cluster handles it.
Not a strong corpus signal. Some viral young channels have very few videos.
May not be in our DB consistently; noisier than view count alone.
Listicle creators don't filter by geography (English-speaking audience assumed).

earnings_monthly_usd_claimed.note: side-effect of other filters, not a discovery filter itself

consensus_picks_in_corpus.note: Channels referenced multiple times across our analyzed listicle videos — strong meta-signal of pick-worthiness

test_cases.name: VES STICK (Money Groot's #1 example)
test_cases.verdict: All hard filters pass; strong virality score

test_cases.name: InVideo For Content Creators (brand account)
test_cases.verdict: Correctly rejected by recency rule even without an explicit brand-account filter — recency captures it

test_cases.name: Productive Peter (consensus pick × 6)
test_cases.verdict: Composite score reduced by overpicked penalty; can still appear but less likely top of list

test_cases.name: Brand-new channel (28d, 50K subs, 2M debut video)
test_cases.verdict: Exactly the 'fresh and breaking' channel listicle creators love — extreme recency bonus

default_parameters.note: Pull top-5 per niche then let assembly gates select final 2 per niche from those
